sc.political.s: FEC: AWS parent Amazon donated 54% Democratic, 46% Republican in 2022 cycle ($7.4M total).
sc.dei.s: Published diversity reports annually since 2015; HRC Corporate Equality Index score 100 (2024).
sc.environment.s: Committed to net-zero by 2040; Scope 1+2 disclosed; no EPA enforcement actions found.
sc.labor.s: NLRB cases filed 2022-2024; no unfair labor practice findings published; ongoing warehouse safety investigations.
sc.charity.s: AWS Disaster Response Program, AWS Community Tech Fund: $200M+ committed since 2020.
sc.guns.s: Does not manufacture or retail firearms.
sc.privacy.s: No documented breaches attributed to AWS service infrastructure; privacy policy standard for cloud provider.
sc.execPay.s: AWS is subsidiary; parent company CEO-to-median-worker ratio ~150:1 (2023).

charity.amt: $53 million+ (Climate Pledge Fund) plus ongoing grant programs
charity.focus: STEM education, climate innovation, disaster relief, childhood-to-career programs

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
